# NAICS 492110 — Courier & Express Delivery Sub Tracker
NAICS: 492110 — Couriers and Express Delivery Services
H&C Use Case: Lab/medical/pharmacy specimen courier for VA and federal medical facilities
Last updated: 2026-06-02

---

## RULES
- Subs must be in the right geographic area (within 50 mi of place of performance)
- Target: 1-50 employees, local/regional only, owner-operated preferred
- SAM.gov registration required before final award — H&C assists if needed
- Never disclose H&C markup to sub
- Log every outreach attempt below

---

## NOTES
- VA lab courier contracts are typically $75K–$250K/year recurring
- Subs should quote per-route or per-trip rate; H&C builds annual estimate
- VA typically renews these contracts — good subs = long-term revenue stream
- Sub outreach script: /ops/sops/HC-SOP-001-bid-and-vendor-sourcing.md § Step 6
